{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Kotai Shou
| introduced = cradle-04-skysworn
}}

== Skysworn ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Kotai Shou]] is the third-ranked [[Underlord]] and has a prosthetic arm made from a stone-[[madra]] [[Remnant]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c11">''Skysworn'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Kotai Shou]] has a gray face and stone fingers.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c11" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
